headline: How The Story Is Shifting For KKR (KKR) As Analysts Rework Valuation Targets
summary: The average fair value estimate for KKR has been revised from US$143.87 to US$140.40 per share, signaling a modest reset in where analysts currently see equilibrium value. That adjustment sits alongside a wave of fresh initiations, rating changes, and target cuts to levels like US$127, US$125 and US$168, as well as at least one move to Hold, showing how split the Street is between long term franchise views and nearer term execution risk. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets...
